title: IPC to BNS Section Lookup
description: Mapping of Indian Penal Code (IPC) sections to Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (BNS) sections effective 1 July 2024
source: NCRB Section Table & Comparison Summary (CAPT Bhopal)

data.subject_offence: Punishment of offences committed within India
Punishment of offences committed beyond India

data.key_change_notes: 'Government of a State' replaced by 'State Government'

data.subject_offence: Words referring to acts include illegal omissions
Acts done in furtherance of common intention
Effect partly by act and partly by omission
Co-operation by doing one of several acts
Illegal and legally bound to do

Limit to imprisonment for non-payment of fine

data.key_change_notes: 'Or in default of community service' added

data.key_change_notes: Replaced by BNS S.152 – 'Acts Endangering Sovereignty, Unity and Integrity of India'; word 'sedition' dropped; scope broadened; max punishment increased from 3 yrs to 7 yrs / life imprisonment

data.subject_offence: Waging war against friendly foreign state
data.key_change_notes: 'Asiatic power' → 'Government of any foreign State at peace'

Imprisonment increased from 6 months to 2 years

data.subject_offence: Joining unlawful assembly armed with deadly weapon

data.key_change_notes: Split into two subsections; fine minimum Rs 25,000

data.key_change_notes: Fine increased from Rs 100 to Rs 1000

data.subject_offence: Punishment for undue influence or personation

Fine increased from Rs 500 to Rs 5000
